title: E-Courts Phase III Policy
desc: Agami worked as an expert member to the SC e-Committee to draft the Vision Document for Phase III of the e-Courts policy. INR 7000 Cr has been approved to implement this policy.

title: Foundational Digital Infrastructure: DRISTI
desc: The world's first open source case management platform for resolution services.

title: 24x7 ON Court, Kerala
desc: PUCAR is Knowledge Partner to the High Court of Kerala to launch and scale the 24x7 Open and Networked Court.

title: Motor Accident Claims | Ernakulam District Court
desc: Case life cycle information for a sample of 50 cases from the Ernakulam District Court MACT, filed and disposed between 2017 and 2022.

title: Motor Accident Claims | Bengaluru Small Causes Court
desc: Case life cycle information for a sample of 48 cases from the Bengaluru Small Causes Court.

title: Diagnosing Issues in MACT Cases
desc: Findings on the incentives of actors, volume of cases, and an initial order analysis for motor accident claims.

title: Case Life Cycle Dataset: MACT District Court Samples
desc: MACT case life cycle information for 100 randomly collected cases from district courts in Kerala, Karnataka, Maharashtra, and Tamil Nadu.

title: Who is litigating cheque bounce cases?
desc: Who are the litigants in Section 138 cases? Does the nature of cases vary based on who the participants are?

title: Cheque Bounce Cases Litigant Classifier Code
desc: Code to build a profile of litigants in cheque bouncing cases.

title: Profile of litigants in cheque bounce cases
desc: Data on the profile of litigants in Mumbai cheque bouncing cases, classified as individuals, financial firms, and non-financial firms.

title: Cheque Bounce Cases | Ernakulam District Court
desc: Case life cycle information for 48 cases from the Ernakulam District Court's special bench for Negotiable Instruments Act cases.

title: Cheque Bounce Cases | Bengaluru Small Causes Court
desc: Case life cycle information for 46 cases from the Bengaluru Small Causes Court.

title: Diagnosing Issues in Cheque Bounce Cases
desc: Findings on the incentives of actors, litigant analysis, insights from research papers, and an initial order analysis for cheque bounce cases.

title: Case Life Cycle Dataset: Cheque Bounce District Court Samples
desc: Cheque bounce case life cycle information for 100 randomly collected cases from district courts in Kerala, Karnataka, Maharashtra, and Tamil Nadu.

title: A Day in Court: Time & Motion Study
desc: Using time and motion studies to understand the utilisation of judicial time in district courts.

title: Key Questions for Assessing District Court Functioning
desc: Research and baselining questions for understanding the current functioning of district courts.

title: The Consequences of Criminalising Cheque Bounce Disputes
desc: Which consequences of criminalising cheque bouncing would arise, in reverse, if it were de-criminalised?

title: Evaluating contract enforcement by courts in India: a litigant's lens
desc: Using the litigant's expectations as performance metrics, this paper develops an evaluative framework for comparing similar courts.

title: The litigant perspective upon courts
desc: A legal system measurement that produces insights for litigants who are litigating debt disputes.

title: Debt recovery litigation in Bombay courts
desc: A dataset of about 5000 debt dispute cases filed at the Bombay High Court, NCLT Mumbai, and DRT Mumbai.

title: Empowering Litigants to understand Debt Recovery
desc: An interactive view of about 5000 debt dispute cases across Mumbai forums, built for litigants.

title: Survey-based measurement of Indian courts
desc: Ongoing surveys of user experience of courts can help measure legal system performance and assess the impact of interventions.

title: Perception survey of practitioners: Questions & Responses
desc: A survey on the functioning of five alternative forums for adjudicating debt disputes.

title: Perception survey of litigants: Questions & Responses
desc: A survey conducted with litigants at the DRT to understand the functioning of the forum.

title: PULSE Protocol
desc: The Protocol for Unified Legal Services (PULSE): an open protocol for seamless discovery and engagement of legal service providers.

title: ODR Handbook
desc: First of its kind, the ODR Handbook contains insights and learnings to equip you to successfully adopt ODR.
